creator: vvelox@vvelox.net
text:
As soon as shared-mime-info 2.0_2 gets installed, it slows to a crawl for anything that reals it in as it starts thanks to the constantly rebuilding the database cache.

<snip>
[12stableAMD64-head-job-06] `-- Extracting qt5-gui-5.15.2_7: .......... done
[12stableAMD64-head-job-06] `-- Installing qt5-sql-5.15.2_1...
